use_cases: Inline text editing in content management systems where users need to modify text without navigating to a separate edit page
User profile name or bio updates in applications with minimal friction
Quick field modifications in admin dashboards or data tables
In-place label editing for task management or note-taking applications
Editable placeholders in forms or onboarding flows
ai_summary: A lightweight inline editable text component that toggles between preview and edit modes on click. Built on Ark UI, it provides accessibility support and dark mode compatibility with a clean, minimalist interface suitable for any application requiring in-place text editing.
